title: Indrajit
subTitle: Indrajit is an honest police officer who punishes Raja, an MLA's son, for raping a girl. The MLA then kidnaps the former's son and demands Raja's release.

title: Agamikal
subTitle: Sumita is forced to become a call-girl due to a failed marriage and poverty. However, her miserable life changes when she meets Sarbajit who treats her well.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Parvati forsakes her love for Lord Shiva to honour her parents' desire. Later, Mainavati sets terms for approving the marriage arrangement.

title: Mishor Rohosyo
subTitle: Al Mamun, an Egyptian business tycoon, asks his friend Kakababu to help him decode some hieroglyphic symbols that will help trace the will of his teacher, Mufti Mohammad.

title: Dadar Aadesh
subTitle: A devoted family man's world shatters when betrayal leads to tragedy, leaving loved ones divided and struggling to rebuild trust amidst deep-seated resentment.

title: Nawab Nandini
subTitle: Nabab and Nandini, once childhood sweethearts, meet again in college and fall in love despite their differences.

title: Paribar
subTitle: Rahul ventures into the smuggling business and lands in trouble. However, his brother Sagar takes the blame to protect him and their family.

title: Golpo Holeo Shotti
subTitle: Rudra is a pizza delivery man who lives with Anuradha, his girlfriend and an aspiring author. However, a horrific incident changes his life when he starts doubting Anuradha's existence.

title: Sathi
subTitle: Sathi

title: Bojhena Shey Bojhena
subTitle: A tragic love story intertwines the lives of four strangers, leading to unexpected bonds and heartbreak, forever altering their paths after a devastating accident.

title: Bojhena Shey Bojhena
subTitle: A tragic love story intertwines the lives of four strangers, leading to unexpected bonds and heartbreak, forever altering their paths after a devastating accident.

title: Hanuman Dot Com
subTitle: A professor receives a computer to work from home and meets a woman online. Later, his life spirals into chaos when he witnesses her murder through the Internet.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Lord Vishnu asks Kaamdev for help, wanting him to disturb Lord Shiva's meditative state, and Tarakasura reaches Kailash to attack.

title: Love in Rajasthan
subTitle: Yuvraaj and Protha are from rival colleges and dislike each other. However, when they happen to stay at the same hotel during a field trip, they start developing feelings for each other.

title: Saat Bhai Champa
subTitle: A princess is raised by a maidservant, unaware of her true lineage. However, when she learns of her stepmothers having killed her seven brothers, she vows to avenge their deaths and reclaim her right.

title: Apon Holo Por
subTitle: Madhabi is cast out by her husband, Abhijit, after a false accusation of rape. Years later, she reunites with him, determined to prove her innocence and uncover the truth behind the tragic misunderstanding.

title: Chirodini Tumi Je Amar
subTitle: Pallavi, a rich, spoilt girl, falls in love with Krishna, a scooter mechanic, and gets married without her parents' approval. The situation takes an ugly turn when her family tries to separate them.

title: Wanted
subTitle: The police kill Shibu, an innocent man, after mistaking him to be his lookalike Raja, an assassin. To escape from the police, Raja starts living with Shibu's parents as their son.

title: Hirak Jayanti
subTitle: Though they initially quarrel, Jaya and Hiru eventually fall in love with each other. Problems arise after Jaya's father feels that the uneducated Hiru is not good enough for his daughter.

title: Annadata
subTitle: When Amba Prasad realises the harsh truth that his relatives just care for his money, he leaves home. Upon reaching a village, he meets Arun and Aarti and his life changes forever.

title: Le Chakka
subTitle: Abir relocates with his family to Dorjipara, which is home to 11 bullets, a cricket team that is out of luck. He also discovers that the locality is being threatened by a political goon.

title: Le Chakka
subTitle: Abir relocates with his family to Dorjipara, which is home to 11 bullets, a cricket team that is out of luck. He also discovers that the locality is being threatened by a political goon.

title: Apur Panchali
subTitle: Arko, a film student, invites Subir, who played the legendary role of Apu, to attend an award ceremony in Germany. But the old man hesitates to accept the invitation.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Lord Vishnu stops Tarakasura with his attack. Lord Shiva awakes furiously and punishes Kaamdev by turning him into ashes.

title: Amar Sangee
subTitle: Sagar falls in love with Jhilik, who is his maid's daughter. Things, however, take an odd turn when Suvankar, who wants his sister to get married to Sagar, plans to kill Sagar's father.

title: Bandini
subTitle: Devendra, a doctor working at a women's prison, falls for Kalyani, a convicted prisoner. However, things become complicated as the tale behind her crimes unfolds.

title: Krishna Kaberi
subTitle: Two sisters, separated at birth, reunite after many years and decide to seek retribution against the people who harmed them.

title: Premi
subTitle: Sumit, a football player, loses his leg while trying to save Rahul, his best friend. Fate plays a cruel joke when the girl Rahul loves is about to be married off to Sumit.

title: Sejo Bou
subTitle: A poor man falls in love with a girl belonging to a wealthy family. In an attempt to separate them, the man is sent abroad. However, the couple's destiny intervenes, striving to bring them together.

title: Sedin Dekha Hoyechilo
subTitle: Kavita's father holds his daughter's lover's friends captive and asks them to reveal the couple's whereabouts. However, one of the boys, Abir, falls in love with his other daughter, Nandini.

title: Tomake Chai
subTitle: Tomake Chai
